market_context.regime_note: Capital concentrated in BTC — altcoin narratives face headwind

rotation_forecast.rotation_trigger: LaunchZone reaching peak velocity or opportunity score saturation
rotation_forecast.reasoning: Given the high velocity score and opportunity score of LaunchZone, it is likely to reach a peak soon. As it does, capital will rotate to adjacent or contrasting narratives, with Immutable zkEVM Ecosystem being a strong candidate due to its high opportunity score and longer estimated half-life. This rotation is also supported by the historical analog of the L2 Race 2022, which suggests a potential infrastructure narrative peak following a speculative narrative peak.

ai_reasoning: Velocity score of 70 indicates high momentum
Volume change of 250.49% in 24 hours suggests strong interest
Adjusted signal of MODERATE CONVICTION indicates potential for growth despite BTC dominance headwind

market_context.regime_note: Capital concentrated in BTC — altcoin narratives face headwind

signal_data.divergence_signal: MODERATE CONVICTION — strong divergence but BTC dominance headwind

strategy.thesis: Narrative attention is accelerating faster than price. Accumulate before mainstream discovery.
strategy.entry_rule: Enter when velocity_score > 60 AND volume_change_24h > 100% AND avg_price_change_24h < 15%
strategy.entry_trigger: Buy on next daily open after signal confirmation
strategy.position_size: 2-4% of portfolio per narrative (high risk, early stage)
strategy.position_size_adjustment: REDUCE position size by 30% due to BTC dominance headwind
strategy.exit_rule_profit: Exit 50% position at +40% price gain, trail stop on remainder
strategy.exit_rule_time: Exit full position if velocity_score drops below 40 within 14 days
strategy.notes: Split entry into 3 tranches over 48 hours to reduce timing risk

market_context.regime_note: Capital concentrated in BTC — altcoin narratives face headwind

strategy.thesis: Narrative is confirmed and gaining mainstream traction. Ride the momentum with tight risk management.
strategy.entry_rule: Enter when velocity_score 35-60 AND both volume AND price trending up AND global_regime != BTC_DOMINANCE
strategy.entry_trigger: Buy on pullback to 10-day moving average or volume confirmation
strategy.position_size: 3-5% of portfolio per narrative (medium risk, confirmed trend)
strategy.exit_rule_profit: Exit 33% at +25%, 33% at +50%, trail stop on final 33%
strategy.exit_rule_time: Exit if volume_change_24h drops below 10% for 3 consecutive days
strategy.notes: Reduce position size by 50% if BTC_DOMINANCE regime detected
